mapper.select: select p.id, p.name , p.brand_id , p.category1_id , p.category2_id , p.category3_id, p.unit_name, p.slider_urls , p.spec_value , p.status , p.audit_status , p.audit_message , p.create_time , p.update_time , p.is_deleted , b.name brandName , c1.name category1Name , c2.name category2Name , c2.name category3Name from product p LEFT JOIN brand b on b.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN category c1 on c1.id = p.category1_id LEFT JOIN category c2 on c2.id = p.category2_id LEFT JOIN category c3 on c3.id = p.category3_id where p.id = #{id}

select p.id, p.source_product_name sourceProductName, p.product_factory_id productFactoryId, mpf.factory_name productFactoryName, p.source_product_code sourceProductCode, p.source_product_url sourceProductUrl, p.head_img_url headImgUrl, p.logistics_name logisticsName, p.freight_cost freightCost, p.dispatch_time dispatchTime, p.steady_status steadyStatus from product p LEFT JOIN mall_product_factory mpf on mpf.id = p.product_factory_id where p.id = #{id}
